title: HEXISTS
description: Determines whether a field exists in a hash.

returns.description: true if the hash stored at key contains the specified field, false if the key is not found or the field is not present.

jedis.signature: boolean hexists(final byte[] key, final byte[] field)

returns.description: true if the hash stored at key contains the specified field, false if the key is not found or the field is not present.

jedis.signature: boolean hexists(final String key, final String field)

returns.description: Boolean integer-reply specifically: true if the hash contains field. false if the hash does not contain field, or key does not exist.
Boolean integer-reply specifically: true if the hash contains field. false if the hash does not contain field, or key does not exist.
Boolean integer-reply specifically: true if the hash contains field. false if the hash does not contain field, or key does not exist.

ioredis.signature: hexists(key: RedisKey, field: string | Buffer, callback?: Callback<number>)

params.name: flags

returns.description: true if the hash contains field, false if the hash does not contain field, or key does not exist.

returns.description: whether or not the field exists in the hash

content:
Returns if `field` is an existing field in the hash stored at `key`. ## Examples {{% redis-cli %}} HSET myhash field1 "foo" HEXISTS myhash field1 HEXISTS myhash field2 {{% /redis-cli %}} ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="hexists-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} One of the following: * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the hash does not contain the field, or the key does not exist. * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the hash contains the field. -tab-sep- One of the following: * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the hash does not contain the field, or the key does not exist. * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the hash contains the field. {{< /multitabs >}}
example:
HSET myhash field1 "foo"
HEXISTS myhash field1
HEXISTS myhash field2
intro: Returns if `field` is an existing field in the hash stored at `key`.

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
{{< multitabs id="hexists-return-info" 
    tab1="RESP2" 
    tab2="RESP3" >}}

One of the following:
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the hash does not contain the field, or the key does not exist.
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the hash contains the field.

-tab-sep-

One of the following:
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the hash does not contain the field, or the key does not exist.
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the hash contains the field.

{{< /multitabs >}}
